queries.question: Show the IT technicians and network administrators who use Windows.
queries.sql:
SELECT IT_Support_Technician.name
FROM Operating_System_Knowledge JOIN IT_Support_Technician ON Operating_System_Knowledge.ID = IT_Support_Technician.Operating_System_ID
WHERE Operating_System_Knowledge.OS_Name = "Windows"
UNION
SELECT Network_Administrator.name
FROM Operating_System_Knowledge JOIN Network_Administrator ON Operating_System_Knowledge.ID = Network_Administrator.Operating_System_ID
WHERE Operating_System_Knowledge.OS_Name = "Windows"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?operating_system_knowledge a :Operating_System_Knowledge .
    ?it_support_technician a :IT_Support_Technicians .
    ?it_support_technician p:hasOperating_System_Knowledge ?operating_system_knowledge .
    ?it_support_technician p:name ?name .
    ?operating_system_knowledge p:OS_Name ?os_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?os_name_f) = "Windows")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?operating_system_knowledge a :Operating_System_Knowledge .
    ?network_administrator a :Network_Administrator .
    ?network_administrator p:hasOperating_System_Knowledge ?operating_system_knowledge .
    ?network_administrator p:name ?name .
    ?operating_system_knowledge p:OS_Name ?os_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?os_name_f) = "Windows")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}
